prompt: Create a cinematic vertical night street portrait in a futuristic neon city after rain. The main subject is a confident young woman with long dark brown hair leaning casually against a giant glass Coca-Cola bottle that towers beside her, about twice her height. She wears an oversized mustard yellow sweatshirt, fitted light gray jeans, and clean white sneakers; one knee is bent with her foot lifted against the wet pavement, hands tucked into the sweatshirt pocket, relaxed confident pose. The bottle is extremely large, positioned left-center, realistic dark cola liquid inside, red cap, condensation droplets on the glass, ribbed lower glass texture, and a wide red label with the white Coca-Cola script clearly visible. The woman stands on the right side, partially overlapping the bottle, facing slightly toward camera with a stylish late-night attitude. Background: dense urban street with blurred high-rise storefronts, glowing red and cyan signs, bokeh traffic lights, glossy rain-soaked asphalt, strong red reflections across the ground, futuristic premium city vibe. Lighting: cinematic neon rim lights, warm streetlights, red highlights from signs, cool blue accents, shallow depth of field, high contrast, ultra-realistic photography, 35mm full-body fashion editorial look, crisp subject details with soft background blur. Canvas: vertical 4:5 composition, low eye-level perspective, bottle and woman filling most of the frame. Constraints: include exactly 2 main subjects: 1 giant Coca-Cola bottle and 1 woman; include exactly 3 visible outfit pieces: oversized sweatshirt, fitted jeans, white sneakers; no extra people in the foreground, no watermark, no distorted logo, no cartoon style.
